positive: Minimalist watercolor illustration of a group of diverse woodland creatures (fox, squirrel, owl, bear cub) gathered around a stylized glowing constellation map. The style should be whimsical, natural, and modern bohemian, utilizing a limited, harmonious color palette of forest greens, deep navy blues, dusty terracotta, and muted gold accents. Composition should be centralized and highly scalable, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and negative space for maximum apparel print visibility. Incorporate subtle floral wreath elements and delicate geometric line work connecting the characters and the stars. Excellent contrast, clear lines, smooth vector quality, highly detailed, natural light.
